prompt: A drone sprays pesticide across fields while a ground rover monitors soil humidity. The drone must not spray if wind speed exceeds 25 km/h. The rover reports humidity every 10 minutes, and if humidity < 20%, the drone must pause spraying.
constraints: SprayDrone stops spraying when wind speed exceeds 25 km/h
SprayDrone pauses spraying if humidity below 20%

results.constraint: SprayDrone stops spraying when wind speed exceeds 25 km/h
